name: EdgeScrollCamera
shortDescription: Scroll camera when cursor is near screen edges.

eventsFunctions.name: EnableEdgeScrollCamera
eventsFunctions.description: Enable (or disable) camera edge scrolling .  Use "Configure camera edge scrolling" to adjust settings.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureEdgeScrollCamera
eventsFunctions.description: Configure camera edge scrolling that moves when mouse is near an edge of the screen.

eventsFunctions.name: IsCameraScrolling
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the camera is scrolling.

eventsFunctions.name: IsCameraScrollingUp
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the camera is scrolling up.

eventsFunctions.name: IsCameraScrollingDown
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the camera is scrolling down.

eventsFunctions.name: IsCameraScrollingLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the camera is scrolling left.

eventsFunctions.name: IsCameraScrollingRight
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the camera is scrolling right.

eventsFunctions.name: DrawEdgeScrollingBorder
eventsFunctions.description: Draw a rectangle that shows where edge scrolling will be triggered.

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedX
eventsFunctions.description: Return the speed the camera is currently scrolling in horizontal direction (in pixels per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedY
eventsFunctions.description: Return the speed the camera is currently scrolling in vertical direction (in pixels per second).

description:
Edge scroll camera allows the player to move around the scene simply by moving the cursor near the edge they want the camera to move towards.  This is common in RTS games.

How to use:
- Run the action "Enable (or disable) edge camera scrolling" at the beginning of scene
- Run the action "Configure edge camera scrolling" at the beginning of scene

Tips:
- "Progressive speed" makes the camera scroll faster the closer the cursor gets to the edge of screen
- Use the action "Enable (or disable) edge camera scrolling" to turn the scrolling ON or OFF
- Use the action "Enforce camera boundaries" to restrict what the player can see
- Use the extension "Copy camera settings" if you want multiple layers to move
